name: Country Fried Chicken Steak with Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into ½-inch thick slices.
2. Pound the meat with a spiked meat mallet to tenderize.
3. Cut each slice crosswise into 3 pieces. Place in a large bowl.
4. Cover with water and add the salt and vinegar. Marinate for 2 hours.
5. Combine the flour and pepper in a plastic bag and add the meat, one piece at a time, shaking to coat thoroughly.
6. Heat the oil in the deep fryer or deep large skillet over medium heat until it reaches 350°F (175°C).
7. Add the meat in batches (do not crowd) and fry until light brown, about 30 seconds per side.
8. Drain the meat on paper towels and place it on a heated platter tented with foil.
For the gravy:
1. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the skillet, leaving the browned bits.
2. Heat over medium heat and add the flour, stirring and scraping up all of the browned bits for 3 minutes.
3. Remove from the heat and gradually whisk in the milk.
4. Stir in the salt and continue to whisk until thickened, about 1 minute.
5. Serve hot over the steaks and garnish with parsley just before serving.
